zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Clavering於1270年出生時，她的父親Robert FitzRoger Clavering36歲，母親Baroness Margery La Zouche19歲。她與John de Mautby結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1329年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Clavering于1270年出生时，她的父亲Robert FitzRoger Clavering36岁，母亲Baroness Margery La Zouche19岁。她与John de Mautby结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1329年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾瓦可沃斯享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clavering
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name; the Essex name is from Clavering (Essex), but in NE England it is probably from Clavering near Wooler (Northumb).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Clavering was born in 1270, her father, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, was 36 and her mother, Baroness Margery La Zouche, was 19. She married John de Mautby. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1329, in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Clavering est née en 1270, son père, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Baroness Margery La Zouche, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé John de Mautby. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1329, à Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Clavering 1270 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert FitzRoger Clavering 36 und ihre Mutter Baroness Margery La Zouche 19. Sie hat John de Mautby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1329 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Warkworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Clavering è nata il nel 1270, sua padre, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Baroness Margery La Zouche, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato John de Mautby. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1329, nel Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Claveringが1270年に生まれた時，父Robert FitzRoger Claveringは36歳，母Baroness Margery La Zoucheは19歳であった。John de Mautbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1329年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアワークウオルスで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Clavering(이)가 1270년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert FitzRoger Clavering(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Margery La Zouche(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 John de Mautby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1329년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 워k워스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Clavering nasceu em 1270, seu pai, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Margery La Zouche, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Mautby. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1329, em Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Clavering родилась в 1270 г., её отцу по имени Robert FitzRoger Clavering было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Margery La Zouche, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Mautby. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1329 г. в местности варкворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Clavering nació en 1270, su papá, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Baroness Margery La Zouche, tenía 19 años. Se casó con John de Mautby. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1329, en Warkworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
